description_long: This is a traditional axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a heavy, single-edged steel head. The handle is made from a light brown wood, showing natural grain patterns and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The axe head is a solid, dark gray metal with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end, suitable for splitting or chopping tasks. The blade edge is straight and sharp, while the poll is squared off, providing balance and additional striking utility. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, likely using a wedged fit, with no visible screws or modern fasteners. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A traditional axe with a curved wooden handle and a solid, wedge-shaped steel head. The blade is sharp and broad, while the handle shows natural wood grain and ergonomic shaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad steel axe head with its wedge-shaped blade.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the axe head and the handle's end, emphasizing the mounting of the head onto the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded cross-section, ergonomic grip, and visible wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge and flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit with the head mounted onto the handle, no visible fasteners.
